욥기 13:1.content: “Behold, my eye has seen all this. My ear has heard and understood it.

욥기 13:2.content: What you know, I know also. I am not inferior to you.

욥기 13:3.content: “Surely I would speak to the Almighty. I desire to reason with God.

욥기 13:4.content: But you are forgers of lies. You are all physicians of no value.

욥기 13:5.content: Oh that you would be completely silent! Then you would be wise.

욥기 13:6.content: Hear now my reasoning. Listen to the pleadings of my lips.

욥기 13:7.content: Will you speak unrighteously for God, and talk deceitfully for him?

욥기 13:8.content: Will you show partiality to him? Will you contend for God?

욥기 13:9.content: Is it good that he should search you out? Or as one deceives a man, will you deceive him?

욥기 13:10.content: He will surely reprove you if you secretly show partiality.

욥기 13:11.content: Shall not his majesty make you afraid, and his dread fall on you?

욥기 13:12.content: Your memorable sayings are proverbs of ashes. Your defenses are defenses of clay.

욥기 13:13.content: “Be silent! Leave me alone, that I may speak. Let come on me what will.

욥기 13:14.content: Why should I take my flesh in my teeth, and put my life in my hand?

욥기 13:15.content: Behold, he will kill me. I have no hope. Nevertheless, I will maintain my ways before him.

욥기 13:16.content: This also will be my salvation, that a godless man will not come before him.

욥기 13:17.content: Listen carefully to my speech. Let my declaration be in your ears.

욥기 13:18.content: See now, I have set my cause in order. I know that I am righteous.

욥기 13:19.content: Who is he who will contend with me? For then would I hold my peace and give up the spirit.

욥기 13:20.content: “Only don’t do two things to me, then I will not hide myself from your face:

욥기 13:21.content: withdraw your hand far from me, and don’t let your terror make me afraid.

욥기 13:22.content: Then call, and I will answer, or let me speak, and you answer me.

욥기 13:23.content: How many are my iniquities and sins? Make me know my disobedience and my sin.

욥기 13:24.content: Why do you hide your face, and consider me your enemy?

욥기 13:25.content: Will you harass a driven leaf? Will you pursue the dry stubble?

욥기 13:26.content: For you write bitter things against me, and make me inherit the iniquities of my youth:

욥기 13:27.content: You also put my feet in the stocks, and mark all my paths. You set a bound to the soles of my feet,

욥기 13:28.content: though I am decaying like a rotten thing, like a garment that is moth-eaten.
